headline: The D. E. Shaw Group Releases Open Letter to the Board of Directors of CoStar Group
summary: The D. E. Shaw group, a global investment and technology development firm with more than $85 billion in investment capital and a history of working with companies to help build long-term value, today sent an open letter to the Board of Directors of CoStar Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: CSGP) ("CoStar" or the "Company") expressing disappointment in the Company's decision to reconfigure its reporting segments and, as a result, reduce transparency into the financial results of CoStar's underlying businesses.
